input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.3.1
            TITLE: vehicles must move under their own power only when inside the designated dynamic area(s),

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.3.1: Vehicles must move under their own power only when inside the designated Dynamic Area(s),
D.3.3.1 Vehicles must move under their own power only when inside the designated Dynamic Area(s), 
unless otherwise directed by the officials.

final_answer: Vehicles must move under their own power only when inside the designated Dynamic Area(s), unless otherwise directed by the officials.
